headline: Travelers Launches AI-Powered Claims Intelligence Tool in e-CARMA®
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., May 01, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced the launch of Claim Insights, a new AI-powered capability for customers within Travelers’ proprietary risk management information platform, e-CARMA®.
